2132860.name: Hanoi Puzzles: Spin Match
2132860.description:
Use the rules of the famous Tower of Hanoi puzzle,
where a larger piece cannot be on top of a smaller one.

Every move the piece Spins clockwise changing its pattern,
in most of the cases you have to do one or more extra moves to get the right pattern when stacking.

Features:

  • 50 carefully designed levels;
  • Original soundtrack inspired by Synthwave classics and some cyberpunk touches;
  • Relaxing gameplay, perfect for those looking for casual puzzle;
  • Beautiful futuristic art.
2132860.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
